title: corydalis lineariloba var. capillaris
intro: Corydalis lineariloba var. capillaris, also known as Tu Fu's orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the poppy family, Papaveraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Corydalis lineariloba var. capillaris include pain relief, reduced inflammation, and relaxation of smooth muscle, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Traditionally, Corydalis lineariloba var. capillaris is prepared into teas, tinctures, and capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in modern herbal practices.
